user.title: FamilyBoard
user.description: FamilyBoard is currently configured via YAML. Add a `familyboard:` block to your `configuration.yaml` and restart Home Assistant.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one FamilyBoard instance is supported.

add_event.name: Add calendar event
add_event.description: Create a calendar event using the FamilyBoard add-event form entities and reset the form.

snooze_test.name: Test snooze reminder
snooze_test.description: Force-fire a snooze notification for a given task uid (for testing).

uid.name: Task UID
uid.description: The Google Tasks uid of the task to fire a reminder for.

cancel_reminder.name: Cancel snooze reminder
cancel_reminder.description: Cancel an active snooze reminder for a given task uid.

uid.name: Task UID
uid.description: The Google Tasks uid of the reminder to cancel.
